adjusted.reasoning: Anchor to market (~0.66 Bosnia), slight nudge up. Both on 1pt and a draw eliminates BOTH, so this is a true must-win shootout. Qatar have the tournament's worst defence (7 conceded) and TWO suspensions (Madibo, Homam Ahmed); Bosnia's European-based attack (Dzeko, Demirovic) should be unleashed and may need a multi-goal margin for the best-third race. Model 0.75 is about right but I lean just under it toward the book.

factors.factor: Draw eliminates both; Qatar worst defence (7 conceded) + 2 suspensions

odds.source: BetOnline/FanDuel via web search 2026-06-24 (BIH -230, draw +380, QAT +550)

adjusted.reasoning: Trim model (0.86 Brazil) toward market: bet365 BRA -275, supercomputer 73/20/7. Scotland MUST win to keep R32 hopes; Brazil top the group and want to win it. adjusted.reasoning: HUGE trim of the model (0.83 Mexico) — the Elo rating ignores motivation. Mexico have ALREADY SEALED top spot in Group A; Aguirre is expected to ROTATE heavily and rest key men (e.g. Gutierrez) to avoid bookings before the R32, while Czechia MUST win. The market reflects this: Mexico only -102 (~even money), Czech +285, draw +300 -> de-vig ~0.50/0.25/0.26. Even at the Azteca (Mexico's home crowd offsets some rotation) this is close to a coin-flip with a live draw. Anchor to market.

factors.factor: Mexico already top Group A; Aguirre to rotate heavily, rest players to avoid bookings; Czechia must win

odds.source: BetOnline/market via web search 2026-06-24 (MEX -102, draw +300, CZE +285; Mexico rotating)
